title: Start Epson RC+ 8.0 and create a new project
description:
Start Epson RC+ 8.0 and create a new project

Start Epson RC+ 8.0 and create a new project

Double
	 click the [Epson RC+ 8.0] icon on the Windows desktop to start Epson
	 RC+ 8.0.

Click
	 the [Project] menu on the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu bar.

Click
	 the [New Project] menu entry of the [Project] menu.  The [New
	 Project] dialog box will appear.

Type
	 a name for the new project.  You can use any name.  We suggest
	 that you use the name "vastest" since this will be our test project
	 to make sure everything is working OK.

After
	 you type a name in the name field, click the [OK] button.  You
	 have just created a new project.
